preconditions: User is not authenticated and operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the Home page to finish loading without performing authentication.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads the Home page successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state without redirecting to a login page or requesting authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Person/Profile button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Back button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Notification button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Home button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Customer signup button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Clean survey button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the guest Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Locate the Site survey button on the Home page.
Observe the button state without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login page URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
Observe the resulting page transition and browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can return to the Home page after navigating to the login page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button.
Use the browser back action to return to the previous page.
testCases.expectedResult: The user returns to the Home page in guest state and the browser URL returns to http://localhost/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates guest user to the customer-search workflow
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button once.
Observe the resulting page transition and browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow and the resulting URL contains customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates guest user to the vehicle-survey workflow
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button once.
Observe the resulting page transition and browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates guest user to the survey workflow
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Site survey button once.
Observe the resulting page transition and browser URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow and the resulting URL contains survey?data.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains interactive when selected from the Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Home button once.
Observe the current page URL and page state after the click.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains interactive and the application stays on the Home page with the URL still showing http://localhost/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify all primary guest navigation controls are simultaneously visible before interaction
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Person/Profile, Back, Notification, Home, Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons without clicking any control.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Home page navigation controls are displayed together on the Home page and available for guest user interaction.

testCases.title: Verify guest user remains on the Home page if login navigation does not complete successfully
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button.
Observe whether the browser reaches the expected login URL.
testCases.expectedResult: If navigation does not reach /washtabui/login?data=undefined, the application remains on the Home page or does not complete the expected transition.

testCases.title: Verify guest user remains on the Home page if customer-search navigation does not complete successfully
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button.
Observe whether the browser reaches a URL containing customer-search.
testCases.expectedResult: If the resulting URL does not contain customer-search, the application does not complete the expected transition and the user remains on or returns to the Home page state.

testCases.title: Verify guest user remains on the Home page if vehicle-survey navigation does not complete successfully
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button.
Observe whether the browser reaches a URL containing vehicle-survey.
testCases.expectedResult: If the resulting URL does not contain vehicle-survey, the application does not complete the expected transition and the user remains on or returns to the Home page state.

testCases.title: Verify guest user remains on the Home page if survey navigation does not complete successfully
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Site survey button.
Observe whether the browser reaches a URL containing survey?data.
testCases.expectedResult: If the resulting URL does not contain survey?data, the application does not complete the expected transition and the user remains on or returns to the Home page state.
